title: Hairy Styles
description: Meet Hairy Styles — reportedly famous, allegedly iconic, definitely up to something. The most stylish sketchy creature your alley never asked for but absolutely deserves.
longDescription: Nobody knows where Hairy Styles came from. Nobody knows where he got the gold hands. Nobody's asking. Some say he's famous. Nobody can prove it. What we do know is that he's claimed that doorstep as his throne, his chain is real, his watch is never wrong, and those beat-up Chucks have carried him through more questionable situations than any of us want to know about. With a grin that says "I'm innocent" and eyes that say absolutely the opposite, you'll want to approach with caution. Compliment the drip. Walk away.
